behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the file src/Interpreters/TokenizerFactory.cpp and both literal error message strings asserted by tests.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what's broken (validation missing) without specifying exact code changes.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_error_message_updated_compiles asserts the old string 'separators cannot be empty' does NOT appear; a valid alternative fix that keeps the original message but adds empty-string validation would fail this test, even though instruction only mandates the new message exist.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: F2P tests (test_empty_separator_validation_compiles, test_error_message_updated_compiles) only check syntax via -fsyntax-only and grep for literal strings in source; they do not execute the tokenizer behavior.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub would need to contain the literal error strings and balanced braces; substring check plus syntax check rules out trivial no-op stubs.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Both error messages required by instruction are checked; style guidelines are enforced by pass-to-pass tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have docstrings and are grouped via comment header for Pass-to-Pass tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the file but not specific lines; file location is the task domain.
